name: telegram-download-chat
description: Download, export, convert, filter, and analyze Telegram chats via the telegram-download-chat CLI. Download messages from a chat/group/channel, convert an existing JSON export to TXT/HTML/PDF, filter by date/user/keyword, download media, extract subchats (reply threads), and download whole folders. Triggers on "download telegram chat", "export telegram", "convert telegram export", "скачать чат телеграм", "telegram-download-chat".
